hero.title: Gypsum Works, Plastering & Painting in Tirana and Durrës
hero.subtitle: Professional gypsum works, wall plastering and painting for commercial and residential projects. 100+ completed projects including Vlora Airport and Green Coast Resort. Contact us for a free consultation.

services.title: What Services Does Torra Gips Offer?
services.subtitle: Professional solutions for every construction and renovation project

gypsum.title: Gypsum Works
gypsum.shortDescription: Ceilings, room partitions, decorations and acoustic insulation with quality gypsum.
gypsum.description: We offer complete solutions for gypsum works including suspended ceilings, room partitions, modern decorations and acoustic insulation. We use quality materials and advanced techniques for excellent results.

plastering.title: Wall Plastering
plastering.shortDescription: Interior and exterior plastering with quality materials for smooth surfaces.
plastering.description: Professional plastering services for interior and exterior surfaces. We use traditional and modern techniques to achieve perfect and durable finishes.

painting.title: Painting
painting.shortDescription: Professional painting of interior and exterior walls with quality paints.
painting.description: We offer interior and exterior painting services using high-quality paints. Clean and durable finishes for any type of surface.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Torra Gips was founded with the mission to provide quality gypsum works, plastering and painting services. With years of experience in the construction sector, we have built a strong reputation for quality and reliability.
